baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 226 tests passed, 15 skipped.

schedulePollCancellationUi.summary: Calendar poll option panel exposes manager-only cancellation, validates missing reasons, calls the schedule poll cancel API, and removes the cancelled poll from active state.

browserSmoke.summary: Reloaded the existing localhost tab and confirmed the Home next schedule time/location text uses text-secondary classes. The schedule tab in the current browser state did not expose a selected poll option panel, so poll cancellation was covered by deterministic Testing Library evidence.

dbCheck.summary: Supabase contract check passed for 18 SQL files during the final guard run.

guardVerify.summary: Final verify guard passed after syncing this workstream: design guard passed for 4 guarded files, diff guard passed for 6 changed files, baseline passed, DB contract check passed, and evidence guard passed.

runtimeSmoke.summary: No app entrypoint, Auth/session/API bootstrap, package/runtime config, Supabase schema, or API route files changed.

issuesObserved: The existing browser state did not have a selected poll option panel available for manual exercise, so the poll cancel interaction needed deterministic component coverage.
harnessImprovementProposal: No harness change proposed; the existing deterministic UI evidence policy covered this UI behavior change.
retrospective.reason: The work followed existing UI evidence and diff ownership rules without exposing a repeatable harness gap.
